title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Auto
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Auto is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!
